name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Update From The Campaign Trail - Join Us In Texas!
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- November 13 2015 -
Update From The Campaign Trail
Join Us In Texas!

| Dear Peter Willis, It has been an exciting week on the campaign trail! On Saturday, [we will end the week with a packed crowd in Beaumont, Texas](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-j/). I have done really well in all of the Texas polls, including the [most recent survey](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-t/) showing me in first place with 27%. I love Texas and [I hope you will join me for another great rally](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-i/)! We started the week in Springfield, Illinois where I easily shattered the attendance record in the Prairie Capital Convention Center, previously held by Elton John! It was great to receive such enthusiastic support from more than 12,000 people.
_On stage in Springfield, IL_ On Tuesday, I traveled to Milwaukee, Wisconsin for the fourth Republican Presidential debate. FOX Business hosted an elegant evening and with your support we dominated seven post-debate polls including [TIME](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-d/), [Newsmax](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-h/) and [Drudge Report](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-k/).
_On stage at the Republican Presidential Debate_ On Wednesday morning I visited New Hampshire and joined MSNBC's Morning Joe for a live town hall at Saint Anselm's College. My sons [Don Jr. and Eric](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-u/) joined me and we discussed my debate performance, my stance on illegal immigration, plans to secure our border and protect and create jobs for Americans. Immediately after Morning Joe, I hosted the largest Politics and Eggs event in the history of Saint Anselm's College. I spoke about my vision for the country and took questions from the huge crowd.
_On MSNBC 's Morning Joe with my sons Don Jr. and Eric_ On Thursday, I traveled to Fort Dodge, Iowa to meet with the team at POET, the largest ethanol producer in the country. I met so many great people and enjoyed our conversation about the importance of renewable fuel. I then hosted thousands at a rally where we spoke about many of the important issues that have become the cornerstones of my campaign, including the economy, illegal immigration, strengthening our military and taking care of our Vets! _
Meeting the team at POET in Fort Dodge, IA_ Today we are in Orlando, Florida to attend the Sunshine Summit. Florida is like a second home to me. I have many successful properties here and we are doing so well in the most recent [Florida polls, which show me with 37%](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zhlkrhy-drdiuiutjh-o/). I look forward to being with all of our passionate supporters in Texas tomorrow for what is sure to be a great event! Thank you for your continued support. We are going to make this country better than it has ever been before---with your help we will Make America Great Again!
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-zhlkrhy-l-m)

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

name: Ben Carson
subject: Horror in Paris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31638724:sjAK7ry1N:m:1:876315805:68C092727DD2CB7CD76C882E908A0664:r)
---

Peter,

Last night in Paris, we were reminded that Western civilization faces a hateful, brutal enemy that will only go away if we have the courage and the fortitude to defeat it.

First and foremost, we must pray for the victims. They were guilty of nothing but living their lives.

But we must also recommit ourselves to doing everything in our power to defeat the medieval ideology that led not only to this massacre, but many others around the globe.

The global jihadist movement is intent on eliminating us and our way of life, plain and simple, and as free people it us up to us to use every resource at our disposal to eliminate them first.

As we spend this weekend with our friends and family we should all take a moment to appreciate our freedom, as well as the selfless courage of generations of Americans who have given their lives to defend it.

May God Bless all of us.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A wake up call from Paris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44906203:J4BadWLNt:m:1:1349778030:4A89D4A6D973783BAA10CFD3ED8C61FA:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Like you, I've been deeply disturbed and saddened by the horrific attacks that ISIS carried out last night in Paris. I hope you'll join me in praying for the victims and for the people of France. We need to stand with our allies in France during this difficult time. These horrors should be a reminder of the conflict we're engaged in. This is not about mere geopolitical grievances -- ISIS and al-Qaeda and other radical Islamist groups want to destroy our civilization, and they won't be stopped until we deprive them of their safe havens and destroy them.
**[Watch this video for more of my reaction](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44906204:J4BadWLNt:m:1:1349778030:4A89D4A6D973783BAA10CFD3ED8C61FA:r)** to these horrifying attacks - and the real reasons why radical Islamists seek to kill us:
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44906204:J4BadWLNt:m:1:1349778030:4A89D4A6D973783BAA10CFD3ED8C61FA:r)
---
| As we mourn, we can't lose sight of how important it is for us to take this radical Islamist threat seriously, and do all we can to eradicate it. Sincerely,
Marco Rubio
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

body:

Peter, our faces light up almost every day when we receive pictures like this.

Every new grassroots donation and every bump in the polls is because of our supporters working to spread the word about Ben and his vision for reviving America.

**[If you'd like to help out by showing how much you support Ben, please visit the official Ben Carson for President store now.
](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31639361:sftqBryvN:m:1:876315805:8A86EAFF7F0BD401C44CC181E4481919:r)**
Better yet, if you use the **Promo Code 20OFF1114** in the next 72 hours, everything is 20% off.

So please, [head over there now](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31639361:sftqBryvN:m:1:876315805:8A86EAFF7F0BD401C44CC181E4481919:r) and enjoy the rest of your weekend.

-Official Carson Campaign

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313
